NAVAREA XIX 130/22

 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  240630 UTC SEP 22
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 66-08.4N 008-13.6E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 65-44.3N 007-39.3E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
 66-07.6N 007-45.7E DEEPSEA STAVANGER

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　128/22
